steps.title: Find the matching table row
steps.content: The question asks for the release year of Zelda II: The Adventure of Link, developed by Nintendo EAD. The needed information is the year in that specific table row.

steps.title: Reject other listed years
steps.content: Choice A, Choice C, and Choice D give years listed for other games, not the Nintendo EAD game named in the question. The matching row gives 1987. The answer is B.
